---
title: "Module 04: Tidymodels Pipeline"
---

- Learning objective: establish a reusable classification workflow in `tidymodels`.
- Key message: recipe + model + workflow + tuning keeps experiments comparable.

## Canonical code template

Maintained once for the whole course. Headings match the **Tuesday** slide walk-through (data → recipe → spec → workflow → tuning → finalize → four figures).

{{< include ../_includes/tidymodels-pipeline.qmd >}}
